title: Section 100
content: No suit or other legal proceeding shall lie against the board or Chief Executive Officer or 1[Collector] or any other person duly appointed under this Act in respect of anything which is in good faith done or intended to be done under this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 14 of 2025, s. 41, for "Survey Commissioner" (w.e.f. 08-04-2025)
